gt_sql: SELECT T1.duration FROM pitStops AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 on T1.raceId = T2.raceId WHERE T2.year = 2011 AND T2.name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
pred_sql:
SELECT CAST(pitStops.duration AS INTEGER) AS duration
FROM pitStops
JOIN races ON pitStops.raceId = races.raceId
WHERE races.year = 2011 
  AND races.name = 'Australian Grand Prix';
question: Please list the time each driver spent at the pit stop during the 2011 Australian Grand Prix.
